scenarios.title: AI Pipelines, Workflows, RAG, and Agents
scenarios.when_to_read: End-to-end RAG applications that combine document ingestion, chunking, embeddings, retrieval, chat, agents, services, and deployment.
scenarios.role: RAGFlow skill for maintaining or using a full-stack RAG engine with document parsing, dataset ingestion, retrieval, chat, agents, and frontend/API surfaces.
scenarios.read_when: Tasks mention RAGFlow, document ingestion, parser_config, datasets/documents/chunks, RAG retrieval, GraphRAG, RAPTOR, task executors, chat assistants, citations, or multi-service RAG app debugging.
scenarios.best_for: Tracing RAGFlow workflows across deployment, backend API routes, parser_config, task execution, retrieval/search, SDK/HTTP calls, agent canvas, and frontend integration.
scenarios.avoid_when: Use narrower vector database, retriever-model, document-conversion, or generic web-framework skills when the request is not about RAGFlow or a RAGFlow-like full-stack app.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose ragflow when the task combines RAG application operations, document ingestion, RAGFlow API/SDK calls, or RAGFlow-specific deployment and source-code changes.

scenarios.title: Python AI API Services and Deployment
scenarios.when_to_read: Python AI applications exposed through APIs, Docker/source deployment, service configuration, health checks, auth, route implementation, and operational troubleshooting.
scenarios.role: RAGFlow skill for Quart/Peewee backend APIs, public REST and OpenAI-compatible endpoints, Docker/source/Helm configuration, and service health debugging.
scenarios.read_when: Tasks mention RAGFlow deployment, Docker Compose, service_conf.yaml, DOC_ENGINE, /api/v1, /v1, Quart routes, API keys, OpenAI-compatible endpoints, healthz, MySQL, Redis, MinIO, Elasticsearch, Infinity, OpenSearch, or OceanBase.
scenarios.best_for: Debugging RAGFlow service startup, route prefixes, auth/API-token behavior, backend service layers, SDK/HTTP integrations, and deployment config mismatches.
scenarios.avoid_when: Use a generic FastAPI/Flask skill or infrastructure skill when RAGFlow code, APIs, or config keys are not involved.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose ragflow for RAGFlow API route, deployment, health-check, auth, service-config, or SDK/HTTP tasks; route inside the skill by whether the user is deploying, changing backend code, or calling the public API.

scenarios.title: Document Processing, Unstructured Data, and RAG Preparation
scenarios.when_to_read: Document conversion, OCR/table extraction, parsing backends, chunk preparation, metadata, and RAG-ready document ingestion.
scenarios.role: RAGFlow skill for DeepDoc parsers, parser backend selection, file-type routing, parser_config, chunk metadata, and ingestion handoff into RAGFlow datasets.
scenarios.read_when: Tasks mention DeepDoc, RAGFlow PDF parsing, OCR/layout/table recognition, MinerU, Docling, PaddleOCR, parser_config, Excel-to-HTML, scanned PDFs, empty chunks, bounding boxes, parser tests, or document parser backends.
scenarios.best_for: Choosing or debugging RAGFlow parser backends and connecting parser outputs to dataset ingestion and retrieval behavior.
scenarios.avoid_when: Use a standalone document-conversion skill when the task is not tied to RAGFlow parser_config, DeepDoc, or RAGFlow ingestion semantics.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose ragflow when document parsing issues affect RAGFlow datasets, chunking, citations, parser_config, or DeepDoc-specific OCR/layout backends.

scenarios.title: Agent Frameworks, Tooling, and Sandboxed LLM Workflows
scenarios.when_to_read: LLM agent frameworks, tool calling, graph/state runtimes, MCP, sandboxed code execution, workflow templates, and agent operations.
scenarios.role: RAGFlow skill for agent canvas DSL, components, templates, tools, memory, MCP retrieval, sandbox/code execution, webhooks, sessions, and debug traces inside RAGFlow.
scenarios.read_when: Tasks mention RAGFlow agents, canvas DSL, components, templates, tool calls, memory, MCP ragflow_retrieval, sandbox/code executor, webhooks, component debug, agent sessions, or agent frontend canvas behavior.
scenarios.best_for: Maintaining or debugging RAGFlow's agent workflow engine and integrating it with retrieval, memory, MCP, backend APIs, and frontend canvas screens.
scenarios.avoid_when: Use another agent-framework skill when the task is about a different agent library or a generic MCP server unrelated to RAGFlow.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose ragflow for RAGFlow agent canvas, MCP, memory, tools, and sandbox workflows; combine agent-workflows with frontend-integration when the user changes the visual canvas UI.
